notes: pcidrv KMDF hardware utility routines. DumpStatsCounters acquires WdfSpinLock to safely read counters — spinlock heuristic misfires. All functions are internal helpers, not registered callbacks.

DumpStatsCounters.label: other
DumpStatsCounters.notes: Reads hardware statistics counters under WdfSpinLockAcquire/Release. Internal helper called for diagnostics. Not a registered callback. Scanner mislabels as 'dispatch' via spinlock heuristic — false positive.

WaitScb.label: other
WaitScb.notes: Waits for SCB command register to be ready. Polling helper. Not a registered callback.

MdiWrite.label: other
MdiWrite.notes: Writes to MDI (Management Data Interface) register. Hardware helper.

MdiRead.label: other
MdiRead.notes: Reads from MDI register. Hardware helper.

NICIssueSelectiveReset.label: other
NICIssueSelectiveReset.notes: Issues a selective hardware reset. Internal helper.

NICIssueFullReset.label: other
NICIssueFullReset.notes: Issues a full hardware reset. Internal helper.

D100SubmitCommandBlockAndWait.label: other
D100SubmitCommandBlockAndWait.notes: Submits a command block and waits for completion. Internal helper.

GetMediaState.label: other
GetMediaState.notes: Queries current link/media state. Internal helper.
